genres.name: Jazz
genres.description: Improvisation-focused music including swing, bebop, cool jazz, and modern fusion styles.

genres.name: Rock
genres.description: Guitar-driven music ranging from classic rock to modern alternative and indie rock.

genres.name: Classical
genres.description: Orchestral, chamber, and solo repertoire from Baroque to contemporary classical composers.

genres.name: Blues
genres.description: Roots music characterized by expressive melodies and improvisation over blues progressions.

genres.name: Folk
genres.description: Acoustic and storytelling-based music rooted in local and traditional song forms.

genres.name: Pop
genres.description: Contemporary popular music with strong melodies and broad audience appeal.

membership_plans.name: Basic Supporter
membership_plans.description: Entry-level membership for local music fans who want occasional discounts and association news.
benefits: Early access to selected event announcements

membership_plans.name: Friend of the Association
membership_plans.description: Great value membership with solid ticket savings and invitations to member meetups.
benefits: Invitations to member-only receptions and pre-show talks

membership_plans.name: Concert Enthusiast
membership_plans.description: For regular concertgoers who want the best ticket savings and perks under $100/year.
benefits: 15% discount on all eligible events and workshops
No online ticketing fees for member purchases
Two guest passes per year for selected concerts
Reserved member ticket line at select venues

membership_plans.name: Patron Circle
membership_plans.description: Premium membership for major supporters with the highest level of benefits and recognition.
benefits: Name recognition in season program and website
Invitations to dress rehearsals and patron events
Dedicated patron concierge for ticket assistance

membership_plans.name: Legacy Member (Retired Plan)
membership_plans.description: Archived membership tier for long-time supporters, no longer available for new signups.

donation_campaigns.name: Youth Music Education
donation_campaigns.description: Support free and low-cost music classes, school outreach concerts, and instrument scholarships for young people in our community.

donation_campaigns.name: Community Concert Series Fund
donation_campaigns.description: Help us present free and pay-what-you-can concerts in parks, libraries, and neighborhood venues throughout the year.

donation_campaigns.name: Instrument Library & Repairs
donation_campaigns.description: Expand and maintain our shared library of instruments so that cost is never a barrier to learning music.

donation_campaigns.name: Main Hall Acoustic Renovation
donation_campaigns.description: Upgrade seating, accessibility, and acoustics in the historic Main Hall to improve the experience for audiences and performers.

donation_campaigns.name: Emerging Artists Grants
donation_campaigns.description: Provide micro-grants and recording support to emerging local musicians across all genres.

artists.name: Midtown Jazz Quartet
artists.biography: A modern jazz quartet rooted in classic swing traditions, Midtown Jazz Quartet blends straight-ahead standards with original compositions inspired by the city’s late-night energy.

artists.name: River City Rockers
artists.biography: River City Rockers are a high-energy four-piece rock band known for melodic hooks, tight harmonies, and crowd-pleasing sets that mix originals with classic favorites.

artists.name: Silver String Quartet
artists.biography: Specializing in chamber music from Mozart to contemporary composers, Silver String Quartet performs intimate concerts in historic spaces and collaborates frequently with local dancers and visual artists.

artists.name: Downtown Blues Band
artists.biography: Drawing on electric Chicago blues and Southern soul, Downtown Blues Band delivers gritty guitar tones, soulful vocals, and late-night jam sessions that often feature surprise guests.

artists.name: Neighborhood Children’s Choir
artists.biography: An inclusive community choir for ages 7–14, the Neighborhood Children’s Choir performs songs from musicals, film scores, and world traditions, with an emphasis on confidence and teamwork.

artists.name: Electric Sunset
artists.biography: Electric Sunset fuses indie rock, synth textures, and driving rhythms into an atmospheric live show that’s become a staple of the local festival scene.

artists.name: Luna Acoustic
artists.biography: Luna Acoustic is a folk duo featuring close vocal harmonies, fingerstyle guitar, and story-driven songwriting inspired by regional history and everyday life.

artists.name: Fusion Frontiers
artists.biography: Pushing the boundaries between jazz, rock, and world music, Fusion Frontiers is a virtuosic ensemble that thrives on complex grooves and extended improvisation.

artists.name: City Chamber Orchestra
artists.biography: The City Chamber Orchestra presents programs that range from Baroque suites to contemporary premieres, often featuring local soloists and cross-genre collaborations.

artists.name: Main Street Big Band
artists.biography: A 17-piece big band with a classic swing sound, Main Street Big Band keeps dance floors full with arrangements from the Great American Songbook and new jazz charts.

artists.name: Parkside Buskers
artists.biography: Parkside Buskers are a rotating collective of street musicians who bring upbeat folk tunes, sing-alongs, and acoustic covers to parks, markets, and community events.

artists.name: AfterHours Trio
artists.biography: AfterHours Trio specializes in intimate late-night sets of piano-led jazz, blending standards with moody reinterpretations of pop songs.

artists.name: Thunderline
artists.biography: Thunderline is a power trio delivering riff-heavy rock anthems and dynamic live performances, with influences ranging from classic rock to modern alt-metal.

artists.name: Skyline Voices
artists.biography: Skyline Voices is a contemporary vocal ensemble that performs pop, jazz, and crossover arrangements with tight harmonies and inventive vocal percussion.

events.title: Friday Night Community Jam at Main Hall
events.description: An open community jam session hosted by AfterHours Trio. Bring your instrument or your voice and join rotating house musicians for an easygoing evening of standards, blues, and groove-based jams.

events.title: Family Sing-Along Saturday
events.description: Join the Neighborhood Children’s Choir for a lively sing-along of movie themes, show tunes, and children’s favorites. Perfect for young singers and their families.

events.title: Eastside Jazz Night
events.description: AfterHours Trio brings an intimate evening of piano-led jazz standards and reimagined pop tunes to Eastside Music Studio.

events.title: Parkside Folk Afternoon
events.description: Relax on the lawn with acoustic sets by Luna Acoustic and Parkside Buskers, featuring traditional folk songs, originals, and sing-alongs.

events.title: Sunday Family Music & Play
events.description: An interactive afternoon of songs, rhythm games, and movement activities led by the Neighborhood Children’s Choir and teaching artists. Designed especially for kids ages 4–10 and their caregivers.

events.title: Youth Spring Showcase
events.description: Celebrate emerging young performers with a mixed program of choir pieces, solos, and small ensembles featuring the Neighborhood Children’s Choir and guests from Skyline Voices.

events.title: Jazz Under the Stars
events.description: An open-air evening of jazz featuring Fusion Frontiers and Skyline Voices, with adventurous arrangements and lush harmonies under the summer sky.

events.title: Late Night Loft Jazz
events.description: AfterHours Trio returns for a cozy late-night set of modern jazz at Eastside Music Studio, with dim lights and café seating.

events.title: Main Hall Big Band Bash
events.description: Main Street Big Band fills the Main Hall with classic swing charts and modern big band favorites. Dance floor open all night.

events.title: Riverside Jazz Brunch
events.description: Enjoy a relaxed late-morning set by Midtown Jazz Quartet with brunch specials available from the riverside café.

events.title: River City Rockers Live at West End Club
events.description: A high-energy night of guitar-driven rock anthems and sing-along choruses with River City Rockers at the West End Music Club.

events.title: Electric Sunset at Riverside Stage
events.description: Indie-rock outfit Electric Sunset brings shimmering synths and driving rhythms to Riverside Stage for an all-ages evening show.

events.title: Fusion Frontiers Live
events.description: Virtuosic ensemble Fusion Frontiers explores the edges of jazz, rock, and world music with complex grooves and extended improvisations.

events.title: Thunderline EP Release Show
events.description: Power trio Thunderline celebrates the release of their new EP with a hard-hitting set of riff-heavy rock tracks at West End Music Club.

events.title: Spring Classical Gala
events.description: An elegant evening featuring the City Chamber Orchestra and Silver String Quartet performing works by Mozart, Dvořák, and contemporary composers.

events.title: City Chamber Matinee
events.description: Silver String Quartet presents a relaxed Sunday matinee of chamber favorites and hidden gems in an intimate setting.

events.title: Blues Night in the Park
events.description: Downtown Blues Band brings soulful guitars and gritty vocals to the Community Park Bandstand for a free evening show.

ticket_types.name: RSVP - General Admission
ticket_types.description: Free RSVP for one attendee. Seating is first-come, first-served.

ticket_types.name: Child Ticket
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission for one child (ages 3–14). Children under 3 free on lap.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Unreserved seating. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime.

ticket_types.name: Adult Ticket
ticket_types.description: Admission for one adult or teen (ages 15+).

ticket_types.name: Child Ticket
ticket_types.description: Admission for one child (ages 3–14). Children under 3 free with adult.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Unassigned seating. Doors open 45 minutes before the performance.

ticket_types.name: General Admission Lawn
ticket_types.description: Bring your own blanket or low chair. Weather-permitting outdoor performance.

ticket_types.name: Main Floor General Admission
ticket_types.description: Dance-floor access and unreserved main floor seating.

ticket_types.name: VIP Balcony
ticket_types.description: Reserved balcony seat with premium view and one complimentary drink ticket.

ticket_types.name: Brunch Admission
ticket_types.description: General seating. Food and beverages sold separately by the caf�e9.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Standing room with limited bar seating. 18+ only.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Unreserved all-ages seating at Riverside Stage.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Seating and limited standing room in Eastside Music Studio.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Admission to Thunderline's EP release show. Standing room club show.

ticket_types.name: Standard Seat
ticket_types.description: Reserved seat in the main level of Main Hall.

ticket_types.name: Senior Ticket
ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for seniors (ages 65+). ID may be requested at entry.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Open seating for the Sunday afternoon matinee performance.

workshops.title: Intermediate Guitar: Groove & Chord Voicings
workshops.description: Strengthen your rhythm playing, expand your chord vocabulary, and learn practical voicings for jazz, pop, and rock settings. Ideal for players comfortable with open chords and basic barre shapes.

workshops.title: Guitar Basics: First Chords & Songs
workshops.description: A friendly small-group class for new players covering tuning, basic chords, simple strumming patterns, and your first complete songs.

workshops.title: Intermediate Piano: Reading & Repertoire
workshops.description: Build confidence reading lead sheets and short classical pieces, with an emphasis on hand independence, phrasing, and steady tempo.

workshops.title: Community Vocal Ensemble Drop-In
workshops.description: A relaxed, all-levels vocal ensemble session focusing on blend, basic harmonies, and fun repertoire from pop and musical theatre.

workshops.title: Intermediate Guitar: Rhythm & Strumming Lab
workshops.description: Focus on tight rhythm playing, muting techniques, and genre-specific strumming patterns for folk, pop, and rock.

workshops.title: Advanced Guitar: Soloing Across the Neck
workshops.description: For experienced players ready to connect scales, arpeggios, and melodic phrasing across the fretboard in rock and jazz contexts.

workshops.title: Intermediate Guitar: Playing with a Band
workshops.description: Learn how to lock in with bass and drums, leave space for other instruments, and build dynamic arrangements in a band setting.

workshops.title: Piano for Absolute Beginners
workshops.description: Start from the very beginning: keyboard layout, simple hand positions, basic notation, and your first short pieces.

workshops.title: Beginner Drum Set Essentials
workshops.description: Learn basic rock and pop grooves, how to count time, and stick technique on a standard drum kit.

workshops.title: All-Levels Violin Intensive
workshops.description: A full-day violin immersion with separate breakout groups for beginners, intermediates, and advanced players, plus a combined ensemble session.

workshops.title: Kids Music Saturday: Rhythm & Song
workshops.description: A playful workshop for children ages 5–9 featuring call-and-response songs, rhythm games, and movement activities.

workshops.title: Songwriting Lab for Guitarists
workshops.description: Explore song structure, lyric ideas, and chord progressions while workshopping your own material in a supportive group.

workshops.title: Band Jam Workshop: Playing Together
workshops.description: Bring your instrument and learn how to rehearse, arrange, and communicate effectively in a band setting. Rhythm section provided.
